name: Zhang Song (Ziqiao)
page_title: Zhang Song (Ziqiao) 張松 (子喬) [Liu Zhang, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Aided Liu Bei in seizing Yi province by showing him a map. Executed for such treachery by Liu Zhang.

sections.literary-appearances: Romance of the Three Kingdoms: 60, 62, 63Sanguozhi: Shu 1
sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi:
Sent as envoy to persuade Cao Cao to attack Zhang Lu but Yongnian’s arrogance, ugly appearance and blunt speech offended Cao Cao, only the pleas of Yang Xiu and Xun Yu prevented Yongnian from being executed. On his way home Yongnian met with Liu Bei and was won over by Liu Bei’s modest attitude and offered his services.

Working on the inside, Yongnian was able to persuade Liu Zhang to ask for Liu Bei’s help against Zhang Lu, despite the protests of other officers. When Liu Bei informed Liu Zhang he was going back to Jingzhou, Yongnian wrote a letter to stop Liu Bei but was interrupted by his brother Zhang Su and his treason discovered. Yongnian was executed in the market place and would never see Liu Bei conquer Shu.

full_text:
Zhang Song (Ziqiao) 張松 (子喬)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Song (張松), styledZiqiao (子喬). Aided Liu Bei in seizing Yi province by showing him a map. Executed for such treachery by Liu Zhang. Zhang Song was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Zhang Song lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

BiographySanguo Yanyi
Sent as envoy to persuade Cao Cao to attack Zhang Lu but Yongnian’s arrogance, ugly appearance and blunt speech offended Cao Cao, only the pleas of Yang Xiu and Xun Yu prevented Yongnian from being executed. On his way home Yongnian met with Liu Bei and was won over by Liu Bei’s modest attitude and offered his services.
Working on the inside, Yongnian was able to persuade Liu Zhang to ask for Liu Bei’s help against Zhang Lu, despite the protests of other officers. When Liu Bei informed Liu Zhang he was going back to Jingzhou, Yongnian wrote a letter to stop Liu Bei but was interrupted by his brother Zhang Su and his treason discovered. Yongnian was executed in the market place and would never see Liu Bei conquer Shu.
